Hub Home > ai-setup-and-automation > Workflow Automation Mapper

Workflow Automation Mapper

Map your current manual workflows step-by-step, then identify which steps can be automated with AI or no-code tools. Outputs a prioritized automation roadmap with estimated time savings, tool recommendations, and implementation sequence.

Intermediate STEP BY STEP Time-saving
Pro tip

Describe one workflow in painful detail — every click, every copy-paste, every handoff. The more tedious you make it sound, the better the automation opportunities the AI will find.

automation workflow zapier make no-code process mapping efficiency time savings

Prompt Variants by Model

Claude Claude 4.x
FRESH APR 2026 
You are a business process automation consultant.

<current_workflow>
Workflow name: [e.g., "New customer onboarding"]
How often it runs: [daily / weekly / per customer / etc.]
Who does it:...
You are a business process automation consultant.

<current_workflow>
Workflow name: [e.g., "New customer onboarding"]
How often it runs: [daily / weekly / per customer / etc.]
Who does it:...

Enter your email to unlock this prompt

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

You are a business process automation consultant.

<current_workflow>
Workflow name: [e.g., "New customer onboarding"]
How often it runs: [daily / weekly / per customer / etc.]
Who does it: [role/person]
Time it takes: [minutes/hours per run]

Step-by-step process (be as detailed as possible):
1. [STEP]
2. [STEP]
3. [STEP]
... continue for all steps
</current_workflow>

<tools_available>
Tools I already use: [e.g., Gmail, Slack, Notion, Stripe, Zapier, Google Sheets]
Budget for new tools: [AMOUNT/month]
Technical comfort: [can use no-code tools / can write basic scripts / developer available]
</tools_available>

Analyze this workflow and deliver:

1. **Process map** — restate my workflow as a clean numbered process with decision points and handoffs marked.

2. **Automation assessment** — for each step, classify as: AUTOMATE (AI or tool can do this), SEMI-AUTOMATE (human triggers, tool executes), KEEP MANUAL (requires human judgment). Explain why for each.

3. **Tool recommendations** — for each automatable step, name the specific tool and describe the exact automation (e.g., "Zapier: when Stripe payment received → create row in Google Sheet → send Slack notification").

4. **Time savings estimate** — current time per run vs automated time, monthly time saved.

5. **Implementation roadmap** — ordered sequence of what to automate first (quick wins → complex). Include estimated setup time for each.

6. **Risk flags** — what could break, where to keep a human in the loop, and how to monitor.
Notes: Claude handles complex process analysis well. The more granular your step-by-step description, the more specific the automation recommendations will be. Include pain points and error-prone steps explicitly.
ChatGPT GPT-5
FRESH APR 2026 
Act as a business process automation consultant who specializes in helping small businesses eliminate manual work with AI and no-code tools.

I want to automate this workflow:

Workflow:...
Act as a business process automation consultant who specializes in helping small businesses eliminate manual work with AI and no-code tools.

I want to automate this workflow:

Workflow:...

Enter your email to unlock this prompt

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Act as a business process automation consultant who specializes in helping small businesses eliminate manual work with AI and no-code tools.

I want to automate this workflow:

Workflow: [NAME]
Frequency: [how often it runs]
Who does it: [role]
Time per run: [minutes/hours]

Here is every step:
1. [STEP]
2. [STEP]
3. [STEP]
... (list all steps)

Tools I already have: [Gmail, Slack, Notion, Stripe, Zapier, Google Sheets, etc.]
Budget for new tools: [AMOUNT/month]
Technical skill: [no-code only / basic scripts / developer]

Give me:
1. Clean process map with decision points marked
2. Automation assessment — label each step AUTOMATE / SEMI-AUTOMATE / KEEP MANUAL with reasoning
3. Specific tool + automation description for each automatable step
4. Time savings: current vs automated per run, monthly total saved
5. Implementation roadmap: quick wins first, then complex automations
6. Risk flags: what could break and where to keep humans in the loop
Notes: ChatGPT can generate Zapier/Make workflow diagrams if you ask. Follow up with "Now create the Zapier zap configuration for step X" to get exact trigger/action specifications.
Gemini Gemini 3 Pro
FRESH APR 2026 
I want to automate a manual workflow in my business.

**Workflow:** [NAME]
**Frequency:** [daily / weekly / per event]
**Who does it:**...
I want to automate a manual workflow in my business.

**Workflow:** [NAME]
**Frequency:** [daily / weekly / per event]
**Who does it:**...

Enter your email to unlock this prompt

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

I want to automate a manual workflow in my business.

**Workflow:** [NAME]
**Frequency:** [daily / weekly / per event]
**Who does it:** [role]
**Time per run:** [minutes/hours]

**Steps:**
1. [STEP]
2. [STEP]
3. [STEP]
...

**Tools I use:** [Gmail, Slack, Notion, Stripe, Zapier, Sheets, etc.]
**Budget for new tools:** [AMOUNT/month]
**Technical level:** [no-code / basic scripts / developer]

Research the best current automation tools for each step, then give me:
1. Clean process map with decision points
2. Each step labeled: AUTOMATE / SEMI-AUTOMATE / KEEP MANUAL
3. Tool + exact automation description per step
4. Time savings — per run and monthly
5. Implementation roadmap — quick wins first
6. Risk flags and monitoring recommendations
Notes: Gemini can research current automation tool capabilities and pricing in real-time. Ask it to verify that specific integrations exist (e.g., "does Zapier have a trigger for Stripe subscription cancellations?") for grounded recommendations.
Copilot Copilot (Microsoft 365)
FRESH APR 2026 
Help me automate a manual workflow.

Workflow: [NAME]
Frequency: [how often]
Done by: [role]
Time per run:...
Help me automate a manual workflow.

Workflow: [NAME]
Frequency: [how often]
Done by: [role]
Time per run:...

Enter your email to unlock this prompt

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Help me automate a manual workflow.

Workflow: [NAME]
Frequency: [how often]
Done by: [role]
Time per run: [minutes/hours]

Steps:
1. [STEP]
2. [STEP]
3. [STEP]
...

My tools: [Gmail, Slack, Notion, Stripe, Zapier, Sheets, etc.]
New tool budget: [AMOUNT/month]
Technical skill: [no-code / basic scripts / developer]

I need:
1. Process map with decision points
2. Each step classified: AUTOMATE / SEMI-AUTOMATE / KEEP MANUAL
3. Specific tool and automation for each automatable step
4. Time savings estimate per run and monthly
5. Implementation order — quick wins first
6. Risk flags
Notes: Copilot integrates with Power Automate natively. If your workflow uses Microsoft 365 tools (Outlook, Teams, SharePoint), Copilot can suggest Power Automate flows directly. Ask for the exact flow configuration.
